an1.10:1.1: "I do not see, _bhikkhus_, even a single touch that so thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind as does the touch of a man.
an1.10:1.2: The touch of a man, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind."
an1.10:1.4: The Chapter on Form and Other Sense Objects is the first.
an1.1:0.2: 1. The Chapter on Form and Other Sense Objects
an1.1:1.2: At one time, the _Bhagavā_ was dwelling at Sāvatthī, in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
an1.1:2.1: "I do not see, _bhikkhus_, even a single form that so thoroughly occupies a man’s mind as does the form of a woman.
an1.1:2.2: The form of a woman, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a man’s mind."
an1.2:1.1: "I do not see, _bhikkhus_, even a single sound that so thoroughly occupies a man’s mind as does the sound of a woman.
an1.2:1.2: The sound of a woman, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a man’s mind."
an1.3:1.1: "I do not see, _bhikkhus_, even a single scent that so thoroughly occupies a man’s mind as does the scent of a woman.
an1.3:1.2: The scent of a woman, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a man’s mind."
an1.4:1.1: "I do not see, _bhikkhus_, even a single taste that so thoroughly occupies a man’s mind as does the taste of a woman.
an1.4:1.2: The taste of a woman, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a man’s mind."

an1.5:1.2: The touch of a woman, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a man’s mind."

an1.6:1.2: The form of a man, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind."

an1.7:1.2: The sound of a man, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind."

an1.8:1.2: The scent of a man, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind."
an1.9:1.1: "I do not see, _bhikkhus_, even a single taste that so thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind as does the taste of a man.
an1.9:1.2: The taste of a man, _bhikkhus_, thoroughly occupies a woman’s mind."
